chunks.title: Contention Against the Land
chunks.reason: Yahweh declares a legal case against Israel due to the absence of truth and knowledge.

chunks.title: Consequences of Priestly Failure
chunks.reason: The prophet details how the priests' sin and the people's idolatry lead to mutual destruction.

chunks.title: Call to Judah and Final Judgment
chunks.reason: Israel is warned not to drag Judah into sin, followed by a description of their stubbornness and final ruin.
